items.title: World's largest chipmaker does not rule out price rises as costs increase
items.dek: In a rare interview, a senior executive at TSMC discusses the AI boom, the geopolitics of chips and what it means for the price of electronics.
items.body: In a rare interview, a senior executive at TSMC discusses the AI boom, the geopolitics of chips and what it means for the price of electronics.

items.title: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
items.dek: The BBC travels with rebels to frontline positions in Myanmar to see how the war is unfolding.
items.body: The BBC travels with rebels to frontline positions in Myanmar to see how the war is unfolding.
